criteria.name: D_full_stack_smoke_workflow
evidence: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 passed all 11 checks and ended STACK SMOKE PASSED.

Passed checks: API liveness (/health = 200), API readiness (/health/ready = 200, db ok), Migration applied (app_meta table + marker row), Worker migration applied (job_queue + service_heartbeat), Worker container healthy, Scheduler container healthy, Queue processed (>=1 job reached done), Heartbeats fresh (worker + scheduler), Web container healthy, Web serves SPA (GET / = 200 HTML with #root), Web proxies API (GET /api/health = 200, status ok).
Independent DB corroboration after smoke: app_meta=1, job_queue_done=218, fresh_heartbeats=2, tables=app_meta,job_queue,service_heartbeat.

criteria.name: F_restart_resilience
evidence: Restart step used pwsh scripts\stack-down.ps1 without -Volumes and completed STACK DOWN, preserving the PostgreSQL data volume.
Then pwsh scripts\stack-up.ps1 completed STACK UP: API is live at http://localhost:8000/health.
docker compose ps immediately after restart listed api/postgres/scheduler/worker healthy and web starting; the subsequent smoke wait promoted web to healthy.
pwsh scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 after restart again passed all 11 checks and ended STACK SMOKE PASSED.

criteria.name: G_negative_api_down_proxy_seam
evidence: docker compose stop api stopped stsyg-automatic-garbanzo-api-1.
With api stopped, Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8080/ returned status=200 and hasRoot=True, proving the SPA still served from nginx static assets.

With api stopped, Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8080/api/health -SkipHttpErrorCheck returned status=504 with Gateway Time-out HTML, proving the /api path is a real nginx proxy seam and not a mocked success path.
docker compose start api restarted the service; api health polling observed starting, starting, healthy.
After recovery, Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8080/api/health returned status=200 and body={"status":"ok","service":"FreeTier Atlas API","version":"0.1.0.dev0","environment":"development"}.

criteria.name: H_lockfile_portability

Unique resolved hosts in apps\web\package-lock.json were resolved-hosts=registry.npmjs.org only.
registry.npmjs.org resolved URL count was 336. The committed lockfile remains portable with public registry URLs while host/Docker npm registry remapping uses the Microsoft proxy.

criteria.name: I_product_truth_shipped_copy
evidence: Scanned apps\web\index.html and apps\web\src\** for zero-cost|free|$0|Z0. There were 9 textual matches, all reviewed.

Matches were product name/service name occurrences (FreeTier Atlas, FreeTier Atlas API) plus technical phrases in comments: "free of hard-coded hosts" and "credential-free message". There were no shipped UI/meta claims that any service is free, zero-cost, $0, or Z0.

Shipped UI/meta copy remains neutral: "evidence-backed catalogue and architecture adviser for cloud and developer service tiers" and "Application scaffold — F002. Catalogue and adviser features arrive in later increments."

end_to_end_steps_run: Confirmed merged main HEAD 9f43e07239c768ff48aed79332f46eb5ee4b74af and all F002 slice squash commits (#5/#6/#7) were present in the recent log.
Verified npm policy before npm-backed work: host registry was the Microsoft package feed proxy with replace-registry-host=npmjs; .env supplied the proxy registry to Docker builds.
Ran the baseline init script, topology inspection, scripts/test.ps1, and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit successfully.
Started the full five-service stack through scripts/stack-up.ps1, verified docker compose ps all-services-healthy, and ran scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 successfully.
Independently probed web root, web /api proxy, direct API liveness, direct API readiness, and PostgreSQL migration/job/heartbeat state.
Restarted with stack-down without volumes, stack-up, and stack-smoke; the workflow passed again.
Stopped api to prove the nginx seam: root stayed 200 while /api/health became 504, then api restart recovered /api/health to 200.
Verified lockfile portability, product-truth copy safety, and LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT command documentation.
Stopped the stack through scripts/stack-down.ps1 and confirmed docker compose ps showed no running services.
notes: This is the FULL-EPIC F002 verdict against merged main commit 9f43e07239c768ff48aed79332f46eb5ee4b74af, covering slices 1+2+3 together rather than a single slice.
All required F002 acceptance steps passed end-to-end: canonical start, frontend/API/worker/scheduler/migrations/database verification, restart + smoke rerun, documented cleanup.
The negative api-down check proved the web /api integration is real: static SPA stayed available while the proxied API returned 504 until api recovered.
No unsupported shipped claim that a service is free, zero-cost, $0, or Z0 was found; matches were product-name or technical credential/host comments only.
The evaluator did not change agent-state/feature_list.json. Because disposition is passed, F002 may now be flipped to passes:true by the authorized builder/ledger step.
A pre-existing working-tree modification to agent-state/current_contract.json was present on evaluator entry and was not changed by this evaluator.
recommendations: Flip only F002 passes, last_verified_at, and verification_evidence in agent-state/feature_list.json based on this full-epic Level 2 passed verdict.
Keep the final stack down; it was stopped and docker compose ps showed no running services.
Proceed to the next owner-approved feature only after the ledger flip/handoff is recorded; do not infer any F003+ domain capability from this scaffold verdict.
